cadence_note: MAS statistics on data.gov.sg are refreshed on a rolling monthly basis (the fastest series are monthly, released ~1-2 months in arrears; quarterly and annual series update less often). A monthly re-pull of the full corpus captures every series' latest release; the whole corpus is small and cheap to refetch. Source: data.gov.sg dataset metadata 'Data Last Updated' fields, mostly late in the month following the reference period.
